narrative:
Henrietta Township has 1,335 registered voters, with 49.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.5%, a modest Republican lean of 5.6 percentage points.
